Enumeration Case# kSCSIDataTransfer_FromInitiatorToTarget

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.0+

```

```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iokit/1534749-data_transfer_direction/kscsidatatransfer_frominitiatortotarget#discussion)

Use this for tasks that transfer data from the initiator to the target.
